title: China's Coal Imports From Russia Jumped By 19% Last Year
section_path: China's Coal Imports From Russia Jumped By 19% Last Year
section_path_text: China's Coal Imports From Russia Jumped By 19% Last Year
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal import data for December by origin has been released and shows that imports from Indonesia have remained China's primary source and Russia the second largest source. Imports from Indonesia totaled 17.1 million tons, which is down from November by 2.9 million tons (-15%) and down year-on-year by 300,000 tons (-2%). Imports from Russia totaled 6.9 million tons, which is down from November by 300,000 tons (-4%) but up year-on-year by 2.8 million tons (68%).
